completed_tasks.name: Full suite validation, bug tracking, old spec cleanup
Fix broken waitForURL regex in 35 spec files
Phone banking investigation and BUG-01 tracking

remaining_tasks.name: Fix remaining 87 E2E failures
remaining_tasks.progress: 157→87 failures fixed across 4 debug rounds. 177 tests now passing.

blockers.description: 87 E2E failures remain — 52 UI element mismatches, 9 timing, 7 a11y violations, 19 other
blockers.workaround: Tests are categorized in debug file. UI mismatches are tests expecting elements that have been renamed/removed.

blockers.description: 3 manual DB fixes not in Alembic migrations
blockers.workaround: Manager role, campaign index uniqueness, import_jobs column — need migrations created

human_actions_pending.action: Run full E2E suite to verify current state
human_actions_pending.context: Docker Compose must be running. Use: cd web && E2E_USE_DEV_SERVER=1 npx playwright test --reporter=line

human_actions_pending.action: Create Alembic migrations for 3 manual DB fixes
human_actions_pending.context: Manager role correction, campaigns.zitadel_org_id non-unique index, import_jobs.last_committed_row column

decisions.rationale: Saves ~144s of unnecessary sleep per full suite run

decisions.decision: Auth state caching — skip auth setup when tokens < 30 min old
decisions.rationale: Saves ~90s on re-runs by not re-authenticating

decisions.decision: API-based auth (#2) not feasible with ZITADEL v2.71.6
decisions.rationale: No password grant, no v2beta OIDC API, PATs are machine-user only. Added ZITADEL upgrade to backlog (999.1)

next_action: Either (1) continue fixing the 87 remaining failures — 52 are UI element mismatches that need test expectations updated, 7 are real a11y CSS fixes, OR (2) stop, create Alembic migrations for DB fixes, update VERIFICATION.md, and close Phase 60.
context_notes: Phase 60 gap closure is complete (plans 60-04/60-05 executed). The live E2E validation revealed many pre-existing test issues beyond Phase 60's original scope. We've fixed 70+ of them across 4 debug rounds. The remaining 87 are diminishing returns — mostly tests that expect UI elements with different names/structure than what the app renders. Speed optimizations (auth caching, networkidle, shared setup, dev server mode, sharding, parallel script) are committed and working — suite time dropped from 7.8m to 6.5m.
